title: Metta-Meditation: Liebende-Güte-Übung gegen Stress und Selbstkritik

longTail: how to do progressive muscle relaxation for insomnia
progressive muscle relaxation script for bedtime
does PMR help you fall asleep faster

competitorInsights: Harvard Health, WebMD, and Sleep Foundation provide clinical descriptions and basic instructions. Gaps: Limited beginner-friendly scripts, no audio/video integration, missing comparison with other sleep techniques (breathing, meditation), no guidance for combining PMR with other practices, minimal troubleshooting.
suggestedAngle: Create the most comprehensive PMR guide with full scripts (10-min, 20-min versions), scientific evidence (including 2023 research on slow-wave sleep increases), comparison matrix with body scan and breathing techniques, combination protocols (PMR + 4-7-8 breathing), and troubleshooting for tension issues.
reasoning: Strengthens sleep category with second article, strong evidence-based technique with proven results (125% increase in slow-wave sleep), complements body scan article with internal linking opportunity, lower competition for comprehensive guides, supports Breathe app credibility with science-backed content
